name: Meatball Kraut Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine egg white, milk, bread crumbs, black pepper.
2. Add chicken and mix well. Shape into 12 meatballs.
3. Heat oil over medium heat in a skillet.
4. Add meatballs to the skillet and cook until no pink remains in the chicken.
5. Remove meatballs from the skillet.
6. In the same skillet, combine sauerkraut and onions. Stir in rice and water.
7. Add the meatballs and crushed tomatoes.
8. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered for 30 minutes or until rice is done.
